name: Gina Raimondo
subject: What happened this weekend, and where we can do better
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Last Friday I laid out what Phase 3 will look like when we ease more restrictions. I want to be very clear: We are not yet in Phase 3. The social gathering size is still 15. And you should still aim to keep your social circle limited. You don't want to see a different 15 people each day. If folks go out now and start acting like we're in Phase 3 already, we're going to jeopardize our progress.
Today, I want to give an update on what we saw over the weekend at our parks and beaches and in businesses, and what that means for our summer going forward.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Savc2-7SNI_59zzX9eCI3N5dWE7-8yHOA1qCJf8BP9u9SgWhQnN7hsNQHX1ImpLDpDUZ4yPEKHeGrs4bwklpvLJyFVRtcT_s1OoZN9bAzIGQUm0Pf-KaKa63fLIt0Ju0Y_cX8rdAGipOtdKlUqXga23JvcffIzWLswu2icdoYiQMrRlkbXDEAC4deE6fmU7KZxB7Ktqf-zQ=&c=lJznFSJCEZDTAq6GoqZm6L-rqL4OpJPLJ7dqHd5ugk9K3yEmXa4ITw==&ch=xvZQ4BrQ1vbypRZLK0dMV7dN9Ho9-d8XIUWSmPJmPTDt_yabF9BFYg==)
---
| It was a beautiful weekend, and it really felt like summer. Not surprisingly, a lot of people were out enjoying our parks and beaches. It was definitely our most crowded weekend yet. Some of our biggest parks reached capacity at different points in the weekend. Visitors were patient in waiting to be let in. If you went to a state park this weekend and had to wait in line or leave and come back, thank you for bearing with us. I know it can be frustrating, but we're doing what we can to keep Rhode Islanders safe.
Saturday was our most popular beach day this year. Overall, we're estimating that throughout the day Saturday as many as 25,000 people went to a state beach. On Sunday, it was more like 15,000. One area where we need to continue to do better is mask wearing. It's true that you don't need to wear a mask if you're able to continuously maintain 6 feet of social distance. But, for example, if you're at the beach and you leave your spot to go to the pavilion, you should be wearing a mask. Chances are you're going to come within 6 feet of someone else outside of your immediate group - and when that happens, you should have a mask on.
Throughout the weekend, DEM rangers at the parks and beaches were out asking large groups to spread out and keep 6 feet of distance - and some folks were frustrated by that ask. I want to continue to remind everyone to please be kind and be patient. As we continue in our reopening, following these rules becomes more important than ever. It's our shared responsibility to do the right thing to keep everyone around us safe. We're all in this together, and I want you to take pride in knowing that Rhode Island is leading the pack in fighting this virus. If you do the work of keeping social distance, wearing a mask, and washing your hands, then you're doing your part to protect Rhode Island.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Savc2-7SNI_59zzX9eCI3N5dWE7-8yHOA1qCJf8BP9u9SgWhQnN7hond_NbFH6FrwCUPMUOxIeDYO1frEKoSDsr10S0PAYKDcec154oj9VteAztiP81LP7bSfRmcw_e-nMBCC4ggirdvqfSKUmSKGTQJPep6IQsYpTlHzQKLFvi5uMIIZc-tGzEaltOxLVTrHYI7wvxlr6I=&c=lJznFSJCEZDTAq6GoqZm6L-rqL4OpJPLJ7dqHd5ugk9K3yEmXa4ITw==&ch=xvZQ4BrQ1vbypRZLK0dMV7dN9Ho9-d8XIUWSmPJmPTDt_yabF9BFYg==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Savc2-7SNI_59zzX9eCI3N5dWE7-8yHOA1qCJf8BP9u9SgWhQnN7hond_NbFH6FrwCUPMUOxIeDYO1frEKoSDsr10S0PAYKDcec154oj9VteAztiP81LP7bSfRmcw_e-nMBCC4ggirdvqfSKUmSKGTQJPep6IQsYpTlHzQKLFvi5uMIIZc-tGzEaltOxLVTrHYI7wvxlr6I=&c=lJznFSJCEZDTAq6GoqZm6L-rqL4OpJPLJ7dqHd5ugk9K3yEmXa4ITw==&ch=xvZQ4BrQ1vbypRZLK0dMV7dN9Ho9-d8XIUWSmPJmPTDt_yabF9BFYg==).
---
| While we worked hard to keep our parks and beaches safe, our inspectors at DBR were out taking a look at more than 200 business across our state. This weekend they primarily visited restaurants and gyms. We're continuing to do very well with mask wearing in businesses. Roughly 94% of employees, and almost 90% of customers were wearing masks at the businesses we visited this weekend. That's great! We want you to keep it up.
One area in which we need our business community to do better is having a COVID-19 control plan. Only about 80% of businesses had the plan ready to give to inspectors. For any business owner who still hasn't filled out a plan, please go to [ReopeningRI.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Savc2-7SNI_59zzX9eCI3N5dWE7-8yHOA1qCJf8BP9u9SgWhQnN7hsNQHX1ImpLDz-bE4bZbjh8A5UZGE_SW2U4mephiEsYbB7KF2Pe0c4MeuWsOpQViTlsnjPIjfwKiwIQFfSP5XLgS3bY1ZnJp_eGm40pRliYx618VnujCuYKeem4n57UuYxstHrWRXNESQ2yY0xXJJFxCapq-t-0IRbKjkUzgoSIzYUSyfEAp8URhcq-b3N7kyNKX-xcim-RJ7u8UC6XzkCpBY0SlKtimq_cmgG7Fszk2K7i9aYV0EisJM40T9vTTxLeqeFnodIlz6w92Lo3dmGVAfrgzise479GG2BM1-49YkyhqL_l3QlPKD4xwWl9_lmjhzaNogUdunwYqdcfUjM9gtlNf1S_Y4DnLh3l-EZzifIck3a85y3qI1iexPwfm_vjf6hA5-rLw50KRYpJEd7T1dLEeRN_XPInF5yykwkBj&c=lJznFSJCEZDTAq6GoqZm6L-rqL4OpJPLJ7dqHd5ugk9K3yEmXa4ITw==&ch=xvZQ4BrQ1vbypRZLK0dMV7dN9Ho9-d8XIUWSmPJmPTDt_yabF9BFYg==). Under "General Workplace Guidelines," you can print out a COVID-19 control plan template. You don't need to send it in, but you do need to have it ready to show us you're prepared. Your plan could save lives.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Savc2-7SNI_59zzX9eCI3N5dWE7-8yHOA1qCJf8BP9u9SgWhQnN7hsNQHX1ImpLDXb9Ptzk-jTu-SPuuRaAnqF5UDo1FKds_MdkUBvAPYByYixBP3_97Sk29xjbwJHFRyABzkgZZ32_pK3CR4OhHOdXs4vrm6EnJnecQbOG2ZVuL26mLbqy5CibzuZfagN0oPpROwD8O0--KBgW_Up84baSmWF14A5p9RMkBhOvVKkk-kihMY6KHi087GLIdYzPoeUPbVZLqnP6wlz2yz99lft-W6jYYKfz6gYnCwQBOA4W3aibWZDFEfJUC7CX64VogCaQpyMbrwg30Q3bTnFX2CchIHZhH8sCFziETZ-3LO64ySgsM_jVDk0KpfCHtjOfuB4pecYWM1WXrbB3IMdpWRp-iPyM7fvon2fMu33PCLboD-752rXSqYyiTxXv8jJ1j&c=lJznFSJCEZDTAq6GoqZm6L-rqL4OpJPLJ7dqHd5ugk9K3yEmXa4ITw==&ch=xvZQ4BrQ1vbypRZLK0dMV7dN9Ho9-d8XIUWSmPJmPTDt_yabF9BFYg==).

Dear Friend, I'm sure you've seen the graphs over the last few days. Part of that reaction has to be an effort to bring this country together, to honestly assess the physical world around us, to inform all Americans what has to be done, and to get buy-in on the shared sacrifice necessary to bring this under control. The core message that has driven my campaign for almost three years is that our political and social divisiveness are hurting us. That divisiveness is now literally killing us. **[Demand Better. name: Corky Messner
subject: My Fellow Granite Stater, Corey Lewandowski
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Our campaign just got a major endorsement! Find out more inside >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c45b96eb32784a3c/c6fb9255a33eb407c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Great news! My campaign for the U.S. Senate in New Hampshire just got a major endorsement. Former Trump campaign manager Corey Lewandowski has endorsed our race to beat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen in 2020. Jeanne is a career politician who is nothing more than a rubber stamp vote for Chuck Schumer and Nancy Pelosi’s far-left agenda. Like Corey, I support President Trump and his America First agenda, that always puts people over politics... And that’s why both Corey and the President have endorsed me! **[Will you join Corey in supporting my campaign by chipping in $5 right now?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c45b96eb32784a3c/03bec9ed25cb62d6c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c45b96eb32784a3c/8b543ae56d5fdfc3c3d6b838967d376c/33153) I’m proud to have a fellow Granite State fighter in my corner. Corey had President Trump’s back from Day One of his historic 2016 campaign, even when the liberal media, Democrats, and Never Trump Republicans piled on. Corey and President Trump knew that Americans weren’t looking for a mealy-mouthed leader. Nope, they wanted a straight talker who wouldn't cower on the road to making America great again. I promise to bring the same kind of no-nonsense conservatism to Washington as your next senator in New Hampshire. We will win and send D.C. Jeanne packing, but I’m not going to get there without your support. Every dollar we raise goes towards reaching voters and getting them to the polls. Corey’s endorsement is a fantastic step towards victory. I'm proud to have a Trump Loyalist and fellow Granite Stater on my side. Will you join him in supporting me in the Republican primary and the fight to defeat Jeanne Shaheen this November? **[Donate $5 NOW to defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c45b96eb32784a3c/73e5d03b6b87b8cac3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

name: Betsy Rader
subject: Ohio is in play
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VHPCHxZTGMLWFwcknMGiQJkeDvzul6oOdR-tpEupdgc=/oHcg2OyVHcseYsyjNqz7CN-HEf16zvuyCEWLgX5s-W4=)
* * *
I'm sure you've already heard Trump call it "fake news," but here in Ohio, _you can feel it._ He's in trouble and people are taking note _(like the[NYT article](https://act.myngp.com/el/VHPCHxZTGMLWFwcknMGiQJkeDvzul6oOdR-tpEupdgc=/oHcg2OyVHcseYsyjNqz7CN-HEf16zvuyCEWLgX5s-W4=) above)_. He promised jobs which never came, attacked our healthcare, and has led us straight into a recession with his gross mishandling of the COVID-19 pandemic-- all the while dismantling our environmental protections, stacking courts, and invigorating bigotry and hate.
**But we know that being anti-Trump is not enough to get people to the polls. We must turn anger into action and ****give voters a Democratic ticket that 's competitive, up and down the ballot. **In my race, I'm running in an open seat for the State Senate and momentum is on our side.
* In the last fundraising quarter, our supporters helped us outraise my opponent** again**
* We've raised **twice as much** as his campaign overall
* Our team has **4x** the cash on hand
* **We have endorsements** from impressive people, organizations, and unions like Senator Sherrod Brown, the Sierra Club, and the United Auto Workers
* And **we 've got over 1,000 grassroots donors** while my opponent has 1/10 of that

_But we know that the Republican Party and special interests will take note and send even more corporate PAC checks to help my opponent. We've got to keep raising the money to make sure this race stays competitive if we want to change state politics in Ohio and turn it blue for the presidential election. A lot rides on these down-ballot races, and that's why we need you today._

Help us keep building the support we need to win this seat in November (and keep Trump nervous). **If you can, a donation of $25 today would be a great start to our new fundraising quarter as we build our staff and digital teams.**

Thanks so much for your support,
Betsy

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VHPCHxZTGMLWFwcknMGiQJkeDvzul6oOdR-tpEupdgc=/2dYGTFiFPMwLRCYFNXTZfe-Mdf4f-P4v0OsdLw5FfK8=?refcode=6.16&amount=25)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/VHPCHxZTGMLWFwcknMGiQJkeDvzul6oOdR-tpEupdgc=/_7dnD0_f66Hj5efdR8dlzAbi7VX5CgJbJK0lS3LDqlQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VHPCHxZTGMLWFwcknMGiQJkeDvzul6oOdR-tpEupdgc=/sASSfijIoJbgsQp1z6ZvdMOBk_lKVW_tHFwMsMxMeP0=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/VHPCHxZTGMLWFwcknMGiQJkeDvzul6oOdR-tpEupdgc=/abmS-kJBI0MDJdDkGoIwcIwEx1rZbvY5qUK2gzNIOoo=)

body:
Today, we can make history. Today, NY-17 is picking its first Representative in three decades | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yrc7gJyBcGWoBIRLqbcnCMT0QncI8UZQHy6hjtHS-cEbWSw1NhHKMwpXYmgPGi5UX3AiJS6GgNv3eo-weffAP8OVcEqRfkDtcNZPMuHY3kCPYHn9Y4A5p4wv-aHwsI6nHdw4FvjE3xN14BpnzEqb9c4S9gzCZwn0oDKI7e5wZFzm2fYoDFZvIGQbX31GQRTPtOM-JYmQL6WG2jKFUi_cWvOE-uPYCegzHGPf8Fm3MrjKEgtU2Lq4ToBRPqxqm_aqadizVtA9g4n-ms_RgueCTK-rcpJH2OAdFibV83kHIVdQ/32v/18kDhNPhRlKWrUjxp-WmnQ/h0/C8ePqu2GNMHKTHuMakrnOIXG4OsaRHE5Lx_uy9eEGvM) Friend,
Today, we can make history. Today, NY-17 is picking its first Representative in three decades, and we have the chance to elect the first black, openly gay member of Congress in our nation’s history. We can elect a people’s champion who knows what it’s like to fight for everything you have, and who will take that fight to Washington on behalf of working people in the district.
**_If you haven’t already cast your ballot, this is your last chance to vote for Mondaire._**
**_[Polls are open from 6 am to 9 pm today. You can confirm your polling location here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/7m9VDUTsZHJXsX_nbnqDrYvHk0-Kebwbj4iMOpGZG_yFJwCQwZCqu_l2RxUX7vP1vHpUTRkI5f5_z8FigL-Y1uxjbAYc9DzirspYupde8_h4Ym9zw6H0zMorTAC9rXpDoGu-lA58L3m0q2EixPuAhQQ94s-_bdkIqtCF7g_MhA8LxWXykB6Mhr3i8FyJY0cyGYEtiuHAldy-Cg3bQBh8wXYHsUYyOGOmwo1_ThHqfUBvqgF0m3SUxJGlsaULHY9pOYvs1kRlv9m8k6u_CWreEA/32v/18kDhNPhRlKWrUjxp-WmnQ/h1/TdahYx_g7CZ_NBh-I6PnoDLJPkaGDXuWLhYqRYgYNYc)_**
This is a crowded primary, and every single vote will matter. Can you commit to telling five friends to join you in voting for Mondaire?
If you face any issues on Election Day, you can call or text our Voter Protection Hotline at 845-293-2848, or email us at gotv@mondaireforcongress.com.
Over the past 11 months, we’ve built a people-powered movement with thousands of supporters and volunteers who all believe in the possibility of a better future. After almost half a million calls, tens of thousands of donations, and countless conversations with friends, family members, and neighbors, we are ready to show the country just how powerful a grassroots movement can be.
We could not have done this without each and every one of you. We are eternally grateful to you for being a part of this movement. All we have left to do is VOTE!
Let’s do this.
Team Mondaire

[Facebook](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiIehPqLp50aR83p0fofD_ekl_jrXe0UAnnuF6eD_E6zvYdAo7ioRJy81nRA4QvBO2INwR9mQP_OU6qkiOkRLyMbaDh1r1ZLHkNRwHsSQpVGxfvlEtDcWwR78r0w82UKQkAvZDZ9ydof_dvsA_lueeQWWu_Y14f1eqSr7aUrZDh2ZY8rrWTydEr7ZuSHXff0gDbGuamwTDjitYDfrwVeNTRW5L6HFmMsrH3_nHuzbH9ZkA/32v/18kDhNPhRlKWrUjxp-WmnQ/h2/aVGj36t4G8ch1Wu0U7RxS6bMmgO1n6H_X6epD4HAWIo) | [Twitter](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/dSCQfi9FLISmU3ZE3bfPhlVeQ7MpruVa0KNw2sbNX7FaHgAq4ezIjM3urw8wX5_wnhzILY3EllFIQRg5ZGz0vj2FEekwqVWh_sOek36eWJy0fPh5upLGKz0Kf90cBfAzqckWxi_gf6eG2J8v3AjCAWVcp0s-saA7NR73YJlYL-pYcIMomIsIGteUZPWbIdSW1i_xIx5R1bLIZwjdPMezrtS_s2je8V8ks4JCTztzP_8Ac0KjyxEtAraesnyo6rjN/32v/18kDhNPhRlKWrUjxp-WmnQ/h3/a7L2TRC4I71neHCf9DvLlOQVnT8Z5AReLV0c_UHAMw4) | [Instagram](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDE-osrDsyUs4KS0eRiq-k7SChrnF8iSfFHczcmiKgbnU8WU_C0pj208LheT55b4gb9JHHpR4eZtN862xAkmkT-EvzyGRhe_Lnki1RlRAz7rqmpQu2VWtnRL1J4F6XXs53Ii22BaXW0e_3yi9M5mLJfvdWTTQWKncUSVqbrCgXJYWNitvDNlNJwWHNirtiv5eQ6crKSyBRdkzFkw48WhXcstMSDU1kLJCf5cLkih4UGCI4qrp64XQKsxSEDZC6a1vYA/32v/18kDhNPhRlKWrUjxp-WmnQ/h4/Qd88oZR3q8fdcbVhTDvzgswbKLpfBo0Sw5ugQ90P2R0)

name: Sandy Smith
subject: Buy your guns, ladies
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hlUr8.oC6pNxmng&b=RQQ..yKrUHR3q21P2VHSpg

Dear Peter,

I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

These times are showing us one important thing: if you haven't exercised your Second Amendment right to own a firearm yet, you should!

ALL of the reasons that the Second Amendment is in the Constitution have been on display lately.

Consider for a moment what was happening a month ago.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hlUr8.oC6pNxmng&b=RQQ..yKrUHR3q21P2VHSpg

COVID was on the rise. Liberal Governors all over the country were taking away our rights- including our gun rights.

Democrats in Fresno, CA passed an ordinance to take away their citizens' gun rights and ability to buy alcohol.

Dems in Bellingham, WA and New Orleans also were taking advantage of the crisis to revoke their citizens' Second Amendment rights.

Dems in Boston ended all non-elective medical procedures, EXCEPT abortions.

The Dem Governor of California revoked gun sales, for a while.

The Democrats in Florida literally arrested a pastor who held a church service that complied with social distancing standards.

Here in North Carolina, our Socialist Governor Roy Cooper has stubbornly refused to re-open our economy.... he even chased away the Republican National Convention from our state.

In Michigan, their insane Governor Whitmer threatened to throw a barber in jail for cutting hair.

These acts are the proof that, if given the chance, if given power, the Democrats WILL take your freedoms away. This is what TYRANTS do!

And the Second Amendment was made to defend against tyranny.

The riots interrupted all that.

All of a sudden, every city was in flames. The police were besieged and overstretched. Suddenly, violent rioters were attacking innocent citizens.

Many women were attacked by violent rioters during that time. Some were sent to the hospital; a few died, including some cops.

Of course, it was never just protesters. Antifa, foreign actors and what Bill Barr called a "witch's brew" of bad actors drove the violence, arson and murder.

The federal officials gathered with Mr. Barr said they’re tracking the violence nationwide, pointing to investigations into more than 800 arsons and 76 explosive devices at protests. They described the violent actors behind them, from Antifa to the far-right Boogaloo movement.

Mr. Barr called it a “witch’s brew,” and FBI Director Christopher A. Wray said different groups are involved in different cities.

Underpinning some of the dissension are the same foreign actors who have tried to meddle in American politics in the past, the officials said — though they didn’t name specific countries nor say exactly what they’ve seen.

Mr. Barr said they are “playing all sides to exacerbate the violence.”

“I believe we have evidence that some foreign hackers and groups associated with foreign governments are focused on this particular situation we have here and exacerbate it every way they can,” he said.

The Trump Administration is tackling the violent rioters head on. But for those on the ground- innocent people being terrorized by Antifa thugs, what should we do?

If you don't have a weapon to defend yourself, you might be a statistic before the police even get there. That is why the Second Amendment exists- to prevent innocent citizens from becoming victims of violent people like Antifa!

Already Minneapolis is disbanding the police, urged on by the odious Ilhan Omar:

Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar went beyond calls to defund the police following the death of George Floyd, instead calling for dismantling the Minneapolis Police Department because it is “rotten to the root.”

“We need to completely dismantle the Minneapolis Police Department. Because here’s the thing, there’s a cancer,” she said, continuing that amputation is needed so it doesn’t spread.

New York, Atlanta, and other cities are doing the same. They seriously think doing away with the police would result in "justice".

Can you imagine how things would go with no police to answer the 911 calls?

If your wife or daughter is in danger of getting raped... you call, and get a "ritual healer"?

If a dangerous drug addict breaks into your house and threatens your life, you call and get.... a "conflict negotiator"?

If you get caught up in a gang fight or a drug cartel war, who will you call? Your local Antifa rep?

These people don't care about your safety. They want to protect criminals with impunity.

The good news is, Americans HAVE armed themselves!

It’s election day in New York – polls are open until 9pm so get out there and vote! Friend, **Polling places are officially open for the New York Primary and it’s time to VOTE!** **[LOCATE YOUR LOCAL POLLING PLACE](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=229fb8e2ed6f44f2a21f84d3620b1096&_e=DPh4QGXGqXoCmC54o_HXYEewSDc8nv_9ztqmb9H6d1_eyoI2H9iNgjAkmdov1on_QcdwVLkKd0UK2ckE22t6UGSLxRXPQetFLBAuEK8qJ3ev6fYWXeJZzytF9boW5FCCXnSHr2g9wraUF7LQHO39mQjTPhbYm1wSVajKNz3XDcvtECHzHuWqJvEwrjMZH7XkoHUn17atgRrMKm6QiF5xKb7fp40A5et2Cj1rD3mVBSFh_iAfko3LHG57y0pnF0cN581U_CI2Jx8b0kMQ9OReQupR9lyC1EOavLGoMA3Fp7W_HmTI4mBgcA37VyMFUjwIH0e8NixRLhcCSWq-G2fbMNfaW9LrOCBDxYT7SIyniIp86q8poeaUufm9xRqKAGPjWAgEEle96v0IVF6vsLYqKVF35sWsuxPo2sLsmFJDCCQi4cVfffjgxqREG_XBi7jg)** **[LAST CHANCE - SEND IN YOUR ABSENTEE BALLOT](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=229fb8e2ed6f44f2a21f84d3620b1096&_e=DPh4QGXGqXoCmC54o_HXYPQpZ5GSpe53XNWp1oyd2Cji0zz0ccMN_FDM-1ulnHeiMu3g29ku-fDE_Cwetf9kMG64CIN0gShdOymk1dDlhTX40IAeeltmc0DcEnoLB2f6O-VjjxLlBcle0lYpELpm0kkkp7-zmsu3O8tsQIkW1Fo5vu7zmRSUHBBZRsqSVvAu0Lz5wUdSaZP66-dmHzPjvXMS5ddKHxkX6GXXWvUkhWW9uqjoW_Z6dZ6QsptBq9nT1-VkK6b7OpJe9m3-dFAe_Y_me8iAJCadiTAQSbFFtEdYN27TLACCiY4M9JkEga_IJlOFq0S5TowDCMRAhDwpaEA8C1JWAUcBSpMIqVQ0S3mYASD6EU8ww1UfhswpRzFJa4WZX1cewNDMMwoH5VPMoZd6018fWKiRXW9nitHzbhIvX5jhESJr0ifGpT1FT3BwfchcDOMfDy5yvElBsWCZAw%3D%3D)** Every single vote makes a difference in these primary elections, and the results of today’s votes will determine the future of our district, state, and country.
**I need you to be a part of determining that future** – which is why I’m encouraging you to get out and have your voice be heard if you haven’t yet cast your vote!
Polling places across the state will remain open until **9:00pm,** and if you’re one of the many New Yorkers choosing to vote by mail, **today is the last day to drop your ballot in the mailbox.**
Your support for this campaign has made a difference so far, and it will definitely make a difference again today.
**Now let’s win this!**
Thank you, Claudia Tenney |

name: Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Should we endorse in your Congressional primary race?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
Congressman Ted Yoho has been a conservative champion since first being elected to the House of Representatives in 2012. We have worked closely with him over the years on a number of issues, and we have always appreciated his support for our values of personal freedom, economic freedom, and a debt-free future.

Congressman Yoho will be retiring at the end of the current Congress. Eight years in office, he believes, is the appropriate term, and he was determined to honor the term limits pledge he had made. We appreciate elected officials who keep their promises, and we will be sorry to see him go.

The primary election for the congressional seat currently held by Congressman Yoho will be held on August 18. As you may know, there are no fewer than 10 candidates campaigning to win the nomination.

Because Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund endorsements are always driven by the grassroots, we are coming to now to ask your advice. Please [complete this brief survey](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTc1LTAxZjcxOTFlNTM5MDQ0NWRiYzc3ZDg5ZTRkMGMzNWY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZXZvclo4OTZac3RVbXVpYmlZR0d0ZDI3MGFUNWtHSUo4UGJCQk5ZU0lxc24yTnNBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjI0MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=Vl2xlZYvutSUmVjPW02Ttg) to let us know your thoughts on this race.
[FL-03 PRIMARY ELECTION SURVEY](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMTc1LTAxZjcxOTFlNTM5MDQ0NWRiYzc3ZDg5ZTRkMGMzNWY3%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9kb2NzLmdvb2dsZS5jb20vZm9ybXMvZC9lLzFGQUlwUUxTZXZvclo4OTZac3RVbXVpYmlZR0d0ZDI3MGFUNWtHSUo4UGJCQk5ZU0lxc24yTnNBL3ZpZXdmb3JtP21pZD00MjI0MSZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=1wVtCXGC0Kx6pWMpv4pBQg)
Thank you so much for your help in making this decision. If and when Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund decides to make an endorsement in this race, we will alert you.

Yours in liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin
Chairman
Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund

| | Peter -- there are a few moments in life where we must step up to fundamentally change the norm. [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d040e/72412298/4d53dcd3/6105c2b6/4215267831/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfYm9va2VyX2p1bmUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDYyM19Cb29rZXJTdXJyb2dhdGVfVTJfWDIiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyMCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_booker_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2") Peter -- there are a few moments in life where we must step up to fundamentally change the norm. _I 've faced one of those moments as I've seen my home state of Kentucky struggle while Mitch McConnell leaves us behind._ **That 's why I've stepped up to run for United States Senate -- because our country cannot afford to re-elect Mitch McConnell.** Polling shows that Mitch McConnell has never been more vulnerable. We know he isn't working for us -- and hasn't been for a long time. Instead, he's working to implement his radical Republican agenda and has gained more power in the process. He's chosen the special interests over the interests of his constituents and for that he'll pay the consequence. _I 'm running to defeat him, Peter but I can't do it without your help._ **We 're running an unstoppable people-powered campaign that's gaining momentum every single day. [Will you join us today and help us hit our GOTV fundraising goal?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d040e/72412298/4d53dcd3/6105c2b9/4215267831/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfYm9va2VyX2p1bmUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDYyM19Cb29rZXJTdXJyb2dhdGVfVTJfWDIiLCJlM3NnWVhOcklIMTkiOiIyMCJ9/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_booker_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=20&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+join+us+today+and+help+us+hit+o&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2")** | | | [Chip in $25 >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d040e/72412298/4d53dcd3/6105c2b8/4215267831/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJ2cHBfYm9va2VyX2p1bmUiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoiVlBQX0VNX0ZSXzIwMDYyM19Cb29rZXJTdXJyb2dhdGVfVTJfWDIifQ%3D%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vpp_booker_june?refcode=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_FR_200623_BookerSurrogate_U2_X2")

**My primary election is TODAY and we have a lot of ground to cover to make it over the finish line victorious.**
It's no secret that I'm a dark horse candidate in this primary race -- people have counted me out for months. _Little did they know that when you speak truth, propose progressive systemic solutions, and hold people accountable to the people they serve_**_\-- you gain a lot of grassroots support along the way._**
The next few hours will determine if I'll be facing Mitch McConnell in November. Peter, we need you on board today or we risk losing all the momentum we've built.
**I 'd be honored to have your support today as we inch closer and closer to hitting our GOTV fundraising goal. clean_body: Peter, We are running out of time. Our election is in just 3 weeks and we are still short of our goal to fully fund this campaign. These last few weeks are critical — we'll need every last dollar to reach out to voters before election day. = = I am asking for your help. I don’t rely on big-money donors or Super-PACs to get the job done. I rely on people like you — people who can chip in a few bucks here and there. We've had over 10,000 people contribute to this campaign because they know that I will fight for them—the people—in Washington. = = = = = = We can do this with your help! Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

subject: "Nehls failed the families that needed him most."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Constable Thompson speaks out about sex trafficking in Fort Bend | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a40555705c35/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12556450?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: KathaleenWall.com** Tuesday, June 23, 2020
---
| | **Constable Wayne Thompson Stands By
Criticism of Troy Nehls

"The Ad Speaks For Itself. Troy Nehls Is No Conservative. He Failed The Families That Needed Him Most." **

_Sugar Land Conservative Kathaleen Wall Airing Powerful Ad on Houston Broadcast Television Calling Out Troy Nehls For Failure To Stop Sex Trafficking As Sheriff_
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall today released a statement from Fort Bend County Precinct 3 Constable Wayne Thompson confirming the accuracy of his criticism of Troy Nehls.

“The ad speaks for itself,” said Thompson. “Troy Nehls is no conservative. He failed the families that needed him most, and failed to charge hundreds of sex trafficking cases.”

Wall’s ad, which has been airing on Houston broadcast television for most of the past week, hammers Nehls’ lack of leadership and indifference to stopping sex trafficking as Sheriff of Fort Bend County.

“Texans want a tough leader and not someone like Troy Nehls who will compromise on conservative values in Washington,” added Wall. “Nehls turned a blind eye to sexual slavery, and even called it a ‘lifestyle decision’ for one of its victims. Shame on Troy Nehls. I can only imagine what he’ll do in Washington.”

Below please find the ad transcript, and the ad can be viewed here: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=g0VO_P-7lZk](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=6dd092a2f2&e=01c99b7fbd)

**CONSTABLE WAYNE THOMPSON: **I’ve seen first-hand how human trafficking has shattered the lives of Fort Bend families.

As sheriff, Troy Nehls allowed it to get much worse.

His lack of attention resulted in more victims.

A young woman was forced into sexual slavery – and Nehls told her grieving parents that she simply made a “lifestyle decision.”

Troy Nehls’ record on human trafficking is disappointing. He’s no conservative. He failed the families that needed him most.

**KW: **I’m Kathaleen Wall. I approve this message because voters need to know.

###
---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=6125b1f59f&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=3799ef0213&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=2b5618c78b&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
[](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=2aebf04f79&e=01c99b7fbd)

Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487

name: Defeat Disinfo
subject: “Slow the testing down please!” - Donald Trump
body:
We’re all just numbers to Trump | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/mRshnjzLbfRUAJcmEcvG0wrDB7MtwPLuSSi4jwn1dr2AEKKvrxXLDWyyWUDJ9fIh3cA_yNrSXYaQXjbaKQCTUlofLJ4kmaD8hMQQrIvoxrfFVwq_P1_jqnJRrojYnzMTyNQQTNhxwDiy8IvH1hThCEUw8rbGPXoCNUZh9Mt9u0fMKN11lwC01-Of7Lk-1Y-ofVPKPfGudFVe5Qak_2CzEmI31Rci_6t3iEGwGBiEJoqFlhkcSx11aLcddaSdNScGyTTjWtOQQKtr5Za7aEWOY3xdmp90UlE99QtqH2QcUJWLi-DXy45PlsRDSaPisrvb/32v/b8ffRN8DQ_ubfW0J4lzrJg/h0/SAaE00nZLU98sD-Lt_X1pFZ1cpNq_juQ_lZc0KXk78w) Friend,

Want to see Trump’s true colors? Ask him to choose between poll numbers and American lives.

Last week, you called the President out on a lie. Trump was spinning America’s rise in COVID-19 cases as a consequence of “big” testing.

Despite being corrected by countless health professionals and experts for misleading the public, Trump was still peddling the disinfo well past his bedtime on Sunday:

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/CMxF4nARlf6wAFa1PSfv0n5Qb5xjaWQ-ETscSkvkipoQ6rgchbOKq9TS-mBWTCzAorJK8Qj9CEuZGGXU8aQ9puAXhg1HbftDh0Kl9nzy6sttQ-DA2q6o_7yoa1DMHCok89vbwWKgIYF2qkZDkY5VTuDpXzQdfyZ4D7yJ0mBd-88_Tx1pvrFw_NsAvhdDDAoc2fiURN2zq7yEYoCj_C5-_DqiUamFf9M_5armDuhaCV8v2aD0gPGPFmtuJS5iVcwEPeZnqoAqae51m7i69tXERC2WMSXWcOgbViX8IWe7IlbapgdJXSzu4-0B2gyku-L5/32v/b8ffRN8DQ_ubfW0J4lzrJg/h1/kZ01WZhTpuX_kbbuFuT4HTW56uR3HjOqsNJb9ZC0d3g) But in Tulsa, Trump must have felt the heat, because he admitted he’s cutting back on the number of tests to save face. That’s right — our president is curbing America’s efforts to treat patients of a deadly virus **because if we treat too many people, his poll numbers will look bad.**

Recounting his own directives to his own staff, Trump said, _“So I said to my people, ‘slow the testing down, please.’”_

His callousness goes beyond disinformation this time. To a crowd of his own base — to applause — he’s admitting, almost boasting, that he’s putting American lives at risk to skirt bad press.

It doesn’t get any more self-serving than this.

COVID-19 is still out there and real Americans are still at risk everyday: **our nurses, our doctors, our friends, our grandparents.** Think of those you love and hold that thought: they’re the ones that Trump has deemed expendable on his war path for the White House.

**[COVID-19 is still taking lives at an astounding clip and Trump is abetting the virus. For this week’s action, we’ll go beyond replacing fact with fiction. Share this post so others can see the reality of COVID-19, a reality that Trump is minimizing to aid his reelection bid.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmvX91IvqsM359gEjyE4pT6kCO91UUKjKQaagETriPoorOmCMejMDysSvUk8VoCsqc7y_owwXUlUtMF0q4os2xOMeDIED_blbi1QtFDpdZ0ncefKtqvsJgwKWaU7QJPQL4Pe1onUrfAz5t0NWfCsTCixr3A5irIqPteNp6Gz57YpW9_5-dRpkpcTGaqKYMGhJVRiiPT3k2AKJPu_uXJgCixC3d8esMB4PhlRH9IC5dR6isaiCQp2we_tArs_LElTT4pdxNZmWlUMaTJEWSnWhCPr4SYyV727RI783FrhpnBmA/32v/b8ffRN8DQ_ubfW0J4lzrJg/h2/aJ1Cl9_4ylAJ8NP4tSxSgQxxdfjIDg0JxuKYGoo6q0M)**

[ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmvX91IvqsM359gEjyE4pT6jxHBljnCs7gj1-vZ6LQ3hLCKuQcJaroJXt_hn2vFtSaspGN0dO9hOqhyRUwOFG_jx6B4fRLiG0r44leiMPT86RuRwEzezGMCHGdjdhKaG1pIfXserx4ZqyaO-I68Xl_b043Yt1vZK7CJVFrqYaPtarifsdwVPkb9kfugfVQMN8VPUCH6osYT7QsmKDGcSo3l2ZOvLmAIH1lH66QnWWVogEVW-bQhf9VJySLWtkfjFL0y1chEKVcVowP_9hhCIBTfaOpRcEx34htC-8fUgdKCE4/32v/b8ffRN8DQ_ubfW0J4lzrJg/h3/hGaH8DGDJSQrmmS5dYvqJvCqs8bBKr_q6puIP2NvbcA) **[When you share this post, you’re not just calling Trump a liar, you’re exposing his true colors: a desperate politician who will jeopardize American lives so long as they don’t stand in his way.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDPAZiEt8wwS6hp5wOIb3CiJjY49n83ivj1JpSpcqTpqmvX91IvqsM359gEjyE4pT6nqR1vmytU17sl1FoVqRifllY6I8aviraToy7RfOkC4Zr3RGvYPdU-CpgAkf_SqAA7FyVCkgb2yqjVL3CILWmWecl4g1K90DCm9UPw19ZJb5mk9NtvoHyCEer-q68KR8QsLcWVHDBsbfPI6P4I6JKwpSV7Cwt3f8VsyxCqFBC8KE0Ck0mlh-VgfFaA7GXZVsND4HE1sDqqmj7aEoJbq_cuoNkVOyS5QWj21iEgefQHpsgUyf_nSNVTkusNnAilJEJ-NKmgS-AqgfywQVXrkYGVI/32v/b8ffRN8DQ_ubfW0J4lzrJg/h4/agGGABiKbBsnf1SJaRGFqNV9sjAseSzT1naghcmTKA4)**

The Defeat Disinfo Team

clean_body: We’re all just numbers to Trump | | | Friend, Want to see Trump’s true colors? Ask him to choose between poll numbers and American lives. Last week, you called the President out on a lie. Trump was spinning America’s rise in COVID-19 cases as a consequence of “big” testing. Despite being corrected by countless health professionals and experts for misleading the public, Trump was still peddling the disinfo well past his bedtime on Sunday: But in Tulsa, Trump must have felt the heat, because he admitted he’s cutting back on the number of tests to save face. That’s right — our president is curbing America’s efforts to treat patients of a deadly virus because if we treat too many people, his poll numbers will look bad. Recounting his own directives to his own staff, Trump said, “So I said to my people, ‘slow the testing down, please.’” His callousness goes beyond disinformation this time. To a crowd of his own base — to applause — he’s admitting, almost boasting, that he’s putting American lives at risk to skirt bad press. It doesn’t get any more self-serving than this. COVID-19 is still out there and real Americans are still at risk everyday: our nurses, our doctors, our friends, our grandparents. Think of those you love and hold that thought: they’re the ones that Trump has deemed expendable on his war path for the White House. The Defeat Disinfo Team P.S. Trump will stop at nothing to cling to the Oval Office, If you were forwarded this email, you can subscribe to receive these weekly action updates on how to fight Trump's lies. | | Sent via . body:

Our FEC pre-runoff filing deadline is coming up fast, and we need to make sure our report shows that we have the resources and momentum needed to DEFEAT Senator Cornyn in November.

Reporters, potential supporters, and even our opponents will use the numbers on our report to judge our chances in November, and we don't want to give them a single reason to underestimate our campaign. **[That's why we're setting a big goal of activating 1,000 new* grassroots donors by our pre-runoff filing deadline. Pitch in to help us get there!](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901bf/7f51f7bc/4eb3ba7e/4ef6c121/2509372235/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1ODgifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqdeadline?refcode=email_20200623.1nd__1588__&amount=10")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Monument in North Carolina Vandalized with Praise for Communism
body:
A World War II monument in Charlotte, North Carolina, was targeted by vandals who spray-painted a hammer and sickle over the names of soldiers | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2b71e4d603&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# WWII Monument in North Carolina Vandalized with Praise for Communism

"A World War II monument in Charlotte, North Carolina, was targeted by vandals who spray-painted a hammer and sickle over the names of soldiers who died while fighting overseas," Maddison Dibble writes in the _Washington Examiner_.

"Wayne White, a U.S. Air Force veteran, gathered a group of volunteers and began scrubbing the monument clean on Monday morning. He told Fox 46 that he was upset by the vandalism because it covered up the 507 names of people from Mecklenburg County who were 'veterans and deserve the honor, respect, and dignity.'”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b933d940c9&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE** : [‘Trump Was Right’: Statue Destroyers Won’t Stop with Confederate Figures](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=23eec4dbb7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Trump is visiting Arizona today “to spotlight his administration's completion of the 200th mile of border wall construction along the nation’s southern boundary with Mexico.” The President will tour the border wall, get a briefing on construction efforts, and take part in a discussion with local leaders, Paul Steinhauser reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5256178f8&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Our national parks are in dire need of repairs. After decades of administrations and Congress paying lip service while kicking the can down the road, President Trump took bold action and provided unprecedented support for Congress to fix the aging [park] infrastructure,” Interior Secretary David Bernhardt writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d35f94a86&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “As anti-police protests continue amid seething politics in the aftermath of police killings in Minneapolis and Atlanta, as violence in many urban areas continues to spike, almost everyone is having their say. Except for police families. They feel under siege,” John Kass writes in the [_Chicago Tribune_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5e05067e54&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=59b003aa9e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=444f580219&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ade2ccd62f)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Indiana sets the standard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Indiana remains the only state that has conducted random sample testing now in two waves. Many people from other states are looking at Indiana... | | |
---|---|---
Friends,

_**All**_ of Indiana is now in Phase 4 of **[Governor Holcomb’s Back on Track Plan](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b225783fd2aa4a388123e31da9956d43&_e=WDStB3hjlYqL-QtahHey5fomjTa4PnPpk4HL3UFZPKMGzJpAte--EaUPKNtbMnOmFsIyZREmWkfwcSaBasyZ8eRKgoa4vxRtaqJk9ztTqRwJ8MSkF2OReUCG25jP6utwKgL5RVcsCheIJUD5ALMzNcvdg5dLAWS9Kl6IzpY8UCtnQuJbOa04xUgsTALoSsyuUfLmqzW_M-YvG4md_onm_Ing2iJctDDcidkfPgaUU3kYs1d2Jtc46Np02agKzmH8oEr6uhzyKhIJOBABM8URn2XXMFNiHj3KxEJLc2xWa5xgjZnCjJdwFi0x1TtnUIns2SsPRQ4n8WRm7Sv8o9J3NW7JRgcN_nFlKSPrGea2TDd2ADixCQ1sFu0D2luMY2v3)** – and as more shops, restaurants and venues open – Indiana is continuing to deliver on COVID-19 testing and data.

_**And when it comes to data on COVID-19, Indiana is leading the nation!**_

You’ll probably remember back in April when Governor Holcomb announced a partnership with the IU Fairbanks School of Public Health to complete a multi-phased study looking at the true spread of COVID-19 across Indiana.

Well, we’ve now completed two phases of the study – and here’s what we’ve found:
* Active infections -- 1.7% (Phase 1) to 0.6% (Phase 2)
* Positive antibodies - 1.1% (Phase 1) to 1.5% (Phase 2)
* They observed fewer active infections, but more Hoosiers with COVID-19 antibodies
* There’s a higher rate of spread among households
* 43% of Hoosiers who are infected show no symptoms

_**Indiana remains the only state that has conducted random sample testing now in two waves. Many people from other states are looking at Indiana – impressed with that we’ve been able to accomplish by working together and focusing on data.**_

Governor Holcomb is continuing to look at that data – and it’s that information that’s driving his decisions as we continue to fight this pandemic and get Indiana Back on Track.

It is all Hoosiers’ responsibility to keep the transmission of COVID-19 low – and the data shows that so far, you’re doing great work!

-Your Holcomb Crew

P.S. Remember, any Hoosier can now get a COVID-19 test – with **[200 testing sites available](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=b225783fd2aa4a388123e31da9956d43&_e=WDStB3hjlYqL-QtahHey5RHozpzMkPwTGU_s1NrhgfO61qOqSjiGqoGOUs22wi2px2IVeA9XZRFT6AEjsSjDKzkcQMkWJOKeYNZ818rlLDsbdVMrtAmPLfM_e7vWlUsWqknT6Q4mM62oqLMvyTRPQ6DWapS9mjfgUOxmHwR6-xiNETtavyQFWNNbO7fd8AdQM6HF0ZTEErspFyJhuEtF9XXLObpfcII_16FD2RDDTfccheegmrxWGwQtezTEGpQm4jaS7CCmF18j1j8zdyImKy4rm3PRiMXosVEGVVjJCtWqW5IzSy-HVxIhTxummVHh8C9gEUUwRFCNCPvW39Jlp4N7s-vRYf9PK9uvUuMLCEHSAGrdc3BDUVtETdNEx4TWvYtjsYInL3iLCPUrlfj_ZQ%3D%3D) **across the state. If you’re concerned, go get tested!

name: Allen Chen
subject: we have an important deadline coming up, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Sri and our entire team hope you and your loved ones are staying safe and healthy during these trying times. As we work together as one nation to fight COVID-19, we know enormous financial and personal stress has been put on countless families. While we remain committed to doing all we can to flip this district and bring true leadership to TX-22, we understand that this may not be a good time for you to donate. We hope, however, that you'll continue to stay with us as we work for a better Texas.
Please visit our COVID-19 community resource guide [https://sri2020.com/covid-19-community-resources/] to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe.

Friend,

In a little over a week, our campaign is required by law to file how much money we’ve raised with the Federal Elections Commission (FEC).
Here’s why that’s important. These numbers are public record, and they become a measure of campaign strength and viability. Outside spending increases around this time period in an effort to ensure that as much money as possible is raised before the deadline -- and for campaigns like us that rely on grassroots donors, it’s harder to compete.

That’s why we need you to help jumpstart our FEC filing goals. If you can, help us show the corporate interest groups eyeing our district that this seat is not for sale by pitching in today.

Chip in now ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.23_ac_b1_all&amount=25

We’re not interested in running the kind of campaign that courts outside spending, because we want to be accountable to the families of TX-22, not corporate interests. This campaign is about addressing the issues of our TX-22 families, from increasing access to affordable health care to ensuring that our small businesses aren’t left behind as we rebuild our economy.

Friend -- our district needs Sri to fight for all of us as our representative in Congress. And while our Republican opponents are tripping over themselves to try and out-extreme each other for the kind of money that will look good on an FEC report, we’re out in the community championing the families fueling our campaign.

And friend, we need your help. Our FEC deadline is only a few days away, and we set an ambitious goal to let everyone know that we can achieve those goals and win this election.

But we can’t do it without you. So if you can, chip in and help power our fight to bring true representation to TX-22.

Chip in now ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.23_ac_b1_all&amount=25

Thanks,
--Allen Chen
Campaign Manager
Sri 2020

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq22020?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.23_ac_b1_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at sri2020.com
Paid for by Sri for Congress
SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Read My Speech: The Dangers of Mob Rule
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted you to read the speech I gave on the senate floor about the dangers of mob rule and the current violence taking place across the country. I will continue to speak out against the liberal mob that wants to tear our country apart. I hope you will continue to stand with me.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42793674&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MTk4MjEzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI3OTM2NzQS1&kn=9&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=2&j=MTc4MTk4MjEzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

As one of my most loyal supporters, I wanted you to read the speech I gave on the senate floor about the dangers of mob rule and the current violence taking place across the country.

I will continue to speak out against the liberal mob that wants to tear our country apart. I hope you will continue to stand with me.
The Danger of Mob RuleI hope I am over wary; but if I am not, there is, even now, something of ill omen, amongst us. I mean the increasing disregard for law which pervades the country; the growing disposition to substitute the wild and furious passions, in lieu of the sober judgment of courts; and the worse than savage mobs, for the executive ministers of justice. This disposition is awfully fearful in any community; and that it now exists in ours, though grating to our feelings to admit, it would be a violation of truth, and an insult to our intelligence, to deny. Accounts of outrages committed by mobs, form the everyday news of the times.”

Now those aren’t my words. Those are the words of a young Abraham Lincoln. But sadly, they ring with truth today. In recent weeks, violent mobs have roamed our streets, defacing and tearing down statues and monuments, in most cases with neither resistance from the police nor legal consequences.

On Friday, a mob tore down another statue just a few blocks from here. The police stood idly by and watched as rioters toppled it and set it on fire. One can only assume they were ordered not to intervene by Washington’s left-wing mayor. But here’s the thing: steps were already underway to move that statue lawfully; Washington’s delegate in Congress had legislation to that effect. But mobs don’t care to negotiate, only to destroy.

The delegate said, “I have no doubt I could have gotten that bill through, but the people got here before due process.” It’s hard to imagine a more chilling summation of mob rule.

As Lincoln knew, the mob threatens not just old statues, but the lives and livelihoods of us all. Indeed, the mob threatens civilization itself in many ways.

Most simply, Lincoln knew that mobs inevitably make mistakes and commit injustices. Some may celebrate the destruction of disfavored statues and monuments.

But what of the vandals in Boston who defaced a monument to the 54th Massachusetts Infantry Regiment—the first African-American regiment to fight for the Union? Whose bravery and skill were immortalized in the movie Glory. And what of the outlaws in Philadelphia who defaced a statue of Matthias Baldwin, a devout, passionate abolitionist? Mobs don’t discriminate between “legitimate” and “illegitimate” targets of their destruction. That’s because they are mobs.

Lincoln also warned that the “lawless in spirit” will become “lawless in practice” because of mob violence, seeing no consequences for crimes.

The mob doesn’t stop at statues. Rioters have already torched police precincts and low-income housing in Minneapolis. Churches and synagogues have been vandalized. Next, perhaps, the mob will target the homes of police officers. And soon enough, the mob may come for you, and your home, and your family.

And as the mob expands its power, Lincoln cautioned that good citizens, “seeing their property destroyed; their families insulted, and their lives endangered; their persons injured; and seeing nothing in prospect that forebodes a change for the better; become tired of, and disgusted with, a Government that offers them no protection.” Mob rule can only serve to demoralize our people and shake their faith in our government and our way of life. As the mob rises, civilization recedes.

Finally, Lincoln observed that “by operation of this mobocractic spirit, which all must admit, is now abroad in the land, the strongest bulwark of any Government, and particularly of those constituted like ours, may effectually be broken down and destroyed—I mean the attachment of the People.” The final victim of mob rule is the very spirit of civic-minded patriotism that’s necessary to preserve our republic.

And for all these reasons, Lincoln said, “There is no grievance that is a fit object of redress by mob law.” We cannot tolerate mob rule and we cannot allow it to go unpunished.

While local authorities would usually take the lead in prosecuting these crimes, unfortunately many of them seem unwilling to stand up to the mob and uphold the rule of the law. Therefore, I call upon the Department of Justice to bring charges against these mob vigilantes, prosecuting them to the fullest extent of the law.

The Anti-Riot Act and the Veterans Memorial Preservation and Recognition Act can provide legal grounds in some cases. Still other federal statutes may govern in other cases. But there must be consequences for mob violence. Because if you give the mob an inch, it’ll take a mile.

Witness the events of just this past weekend, where mobs tore down statues of George Washington and Ulysses S. Grant. When you tear down statues of Washington and Grant, it’s not about the Civil War—it’s because you hate America.

And indeed, these rioters hate America. In Portland, where they tore down the statue of Washington, they also spray-painted on him the date “1619”—a reference to the New York Times’s revisionist anti-American history project. Perhaps we should call them the “1619 Riots.” After all, the architect of that execrable project said, “it would be an honor.”

This hatred for America was nowhere on greater display than San Francisco, where the mob tore down the statue of Grant. That would be U.S. Grant, commander of the Union Army whose very initials embodied his tenacious, unrelenting approach to war: “unconditional surrender.”

That would also be President Grant, the political heir of Abraham Lincoln, a statesman who smashed the first Ku Klux Klan, signed the first major civil-rights legislation, and presided over passage of the Fifteenth Amendment. In one famous instance, President Grant sent in the troops to disperse a white mob in New Orleans that was terrorizing the city’s black and Republican residents, and had deposed the state’s lawful governor.

Grant had zero tolerance for mob rule. He said “neither Ku Klux Klans, White Leagues, nor any other association using arms and violence to execute their unlawful purposes can be permitted in that way to govern any part of this country.”

This was a man whom the great Frederick Douglass eulogized as “too broad for prejudice, too humane to despise the humblest, too great to be small at any point.” Yet the mob still came for Grant.

Some people have been asking, where is the line? I say, this is the line—the line between mob rule and the rule of law. And since I began by quoting Lincoln, I’ll conclude by borrowing from Grant, who wrote during the Battle of Spotsylvania: “I propose to fight it out on this line if it takes all summer.”

And I’ll fight it out on this line if it takes a lot longer than that.
In service, Tom Cotton

Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

Friend -- ELECTION DAY IS ONLY 7 DAYS AWAY.
[**This is our chance to nominate a proven job creator and conservative outsider to face radical liberal Kendra Horn in November.**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/bYBueucxNOmdfFQqz4rPNA/9OHbDTC8hLza1TQPDudiEA)
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/bYBueucxNOmdfFQqz4rPNA/9OHbDTC8hLza1TQPDudiEA)
As one of my strongest supporters, you know why I'm running for Congress: **to help President Trump pass his America-First agenda that will secure our borders, rebuild our economy, and protect our Pro-Life and pro-gun values.**
But with so many candidates in this race, there are a lot of voters in the 5th District who don't know that about me.
They haven't heard about my record of finding 37,000 jobs for Oklahomans. Or that I earned an "AQ" rating from the NRA and that I am 100%, unapologetically pro-life.
If we're going to win in 7 DAYS I need every voter of the 5th District to know about my record as a business owner and job creator, as well as my support for President Trump.
[**Can you help me get the word out?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/bYBueucxNOmdfFQqz4rPNA/9OHbDTC8hLza1TQPDudiEA) My campaign team just told me **we need to raise $1,000 by the end of today** to keep our latest campaign ad on TV.
[](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/bYBueucxNOmdfFQqz4rPNA/9OHbDTC8hLza1TQPDudiEA)
Your contribution is going to help us make sure every voter knows I am running for Congress to help President Trump deliver results for Oklahomans. So thanks for your support. Terry Neese [**P.S. -- We have a goal of $1000 to raise before the end of today. Can you chip in $50 right now?**](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/kQuDPoZT0892iF1HpSDpzb1g/bYBueucxNOmdfFQqz4rPNA/9OHbDTC8hLza1TQPDudiEA)

clean_body: | Friend -- ELECTION DAY IS ONLY 7 DAYS AWAY. As one of my strongest supporters, you know why I'm running for Congress: to help President Trump pass his America-First agenda that will secure our borders, rebuild our economy, and protect our Pro-Life and pro-gun values. But with so many candidates in this race, there are a lot of voters in the 5th District who don't know that about me. They haven't heard about my record of finding 37,000 jobs for Oklahomans. Or that I earned an "AQ" rating from the NRA and that I am 100%, unapologetically pro-life. If we're going to win in 7 DAYS I need every voter of the 5th District to know about my record as a business owner and job creator, as well as my support for President Trump. My campaign team just told me we need to raise $1,000 by the end of today to keep our latest campaign ad on TV. Your contribution is going to help us make sure every voter knows I am running for Congress to help President Trump deliver results for Oklahomans. So thanks for your support. Terry Neese * P.O. Box 12744 Oklahoma City, OK 73157 Paid for by Neese for Congress

body:
I’ll make this quick.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17984658/213227817/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDU0MTUwNC05N2I1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1aN8nztobPNgMUV8fqUltXX5sU1bSmhfczVOWZrX8mE=&emci=bdf6d0b7-86b5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=c4541504-97b5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) Team,

I’ll make this quick. In one week, our campaign will face its biggest deadline yet.

At the end of the month, our campaign has to open its books and show how much money we’ve raised. This deadline matters because everyone will judge the strength of our campaign and our ability to flip this seat by the numbers we put up.

I’ve seen the hard work Margaret puts in every single day as a State Representative and a candidate for Congress. She’s the kind of representative the people of the 16th district deserve, but we can’t get there without your support.

**[Click here to contribute before our public filing deadline.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17984659/213227818/1073285021?refcode=em06232020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDU0MTUwNC05N2I1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1aN8nztobPNgMUV8fqUltXX5sU1bSmhfczVOWZrX8mE=)**

Thank you for being part of our team,

Alex Koren
Campaign Manager | [Donate »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17984660/213227819/1073285021?refcode=em06232020&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDU0MTUwNC05N2I1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1aN8nztobPNgMUV8fqUltXX5sU1bSmhfczVOWZrX8mE=)

| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17984662/213227821/192916899?contactdata=77LNEw2RehxZ3tpcV1NSdCupCVW6AbqRdrRVkwb8Z1Lb5LjstWxkAgorkcflupC1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDU0MTUwNC05N2I1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1aN8nztobPNgMUV8fqUltXX5sU1bSmhfczVOWZrX8mE=&emci=bdf6d0b7-86b5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=c4541504-97b5-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

Peter,
_We must act quickly._
My pre-primary filing deadline is TOMORROW at midnight. Where the numbers stand, my campaign is being severely outraised. That is why my team and I have come up with a new fundraising strategy.
**By the deadline tomorrow, we have determined that our campaign must raise $50,000 to reach our goal and come out on top.**
The only way we will be able to fight through this primary is if we reach this goal. The attacks by Chuck Schumer and his Far Left allies are increasing with intensity, and we must have the necessary funds to fight back.

Susan Collins

The only way we will be able to fight through this primary is if we reach this goal. The attacks by Chuck Schumer and his Far Left allies are increasing with intensity, and we must have the necessary funds to fight back. My opponent has support from Chuck Schumer's billionaire friends and Far Left special interests groups from across the country. Our movement is much stronger, and I know with your support today we can reach this critical goal before our deadline. Thank you for joining me in this fight! My very best, Susan Collins __ Paid for by Collins for Senator P.O. Box 1096 Bangor, ME 04402 Click to unsubscribe from Collins for Senator.

I'm reaching today because we’re exactly one week away from our first -- and possibly most important -- FEC deadline of our General Election campaign.

As it stands, we’re pacing behind our fundraising goal and need grassroots support to pick up the speed.

**[Can you chip in a contribution of $3 to get us back on track before our June 30 deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17984934/213238496/1147193815?refcode=em-200623-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlN2ViYTBmMS05YWI1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JxZbsmIyn0Mkd4Z3mMZHSxJcG7XIcqI0b0qwOk_4j5Q=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Hackett?=
subject: How you can make mail-in ballots a reality.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=6b0ca86b03&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | **Urge Governor Holcomb to Expand
Absentee Voting for the General Election**
---
| Dear Friend,

As the pandemic continues to rage on in our state and country for the foreseeable future, the health and safety of voters and poll workers are in serious jeopardy if absentee voting is not expanded for the general election in November.

Despite claims to the contrary by Republicans, [**there is not evidence of voter fraud through absentee ballots.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a513bca3ac&e=5886ca081d) Mailing in ballots provides a safe and reliable way for voters to avoid high-risk encounters at polling places.

Governor Holcomb has refused to answer whether he will support expanded absentee voting as he did for the June 2 primary. We must show the Governor that the people of this district and of Indiana require the option to safely vote in November.

**Here’s where you come in: **

We need you to call and/or email the Governor to demand he support absentee voting for anyone who wants it for the November 3rd election. We’ve written a script you can use or, if you’d like, you can use your own words to speak of the importance of absentee voting in the middle of a pandemic.

_Script_

_Dear Governor Holcomb - As an American citizen and resident of Indiana, I take very seriously my responsibility to vote. I’m deeply concerned by the prospect that absentee voting for the November general election will not be expanded to any voter who wants it. The coronavirus pandemic is showing no signs of slowing down in Indiana. You will risk the lives of our state’s residents by not allowing absentee voting. This is appalling. This can be easily remedied by you. I am asking you to ask the Indiana Election Commission to expand absentee voting as they did for the June 2 primary for the health of all Hoosiers. Exercising one’s right to vote in Indiana should not be a matter of life or death._ **Call Governor Holcomb
317-232-4567

Email Governor Holcomb**
---
| [EMAIL NOW →](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=17726f4c99&e=5886ca081d "EMAIL NOW →")
---
| Thank you for your help! We are working hard to ensure fair and safe access to the ballot box in November. We appreciate your participation.

\-- Team Hackett

body:

With businesses and public events only beginning to open up from the Coronavirus shutdown, we have elected to hold this event over the phone to ensure everyone's safety. But it’s important for Corky to keep you up-to-date on all the latest developments in this race, and give you the opportunity to ask him any questions you may have. It's easy to join in. **Just dial (603) 506-4097 at 6:30 P.M on this Thursday, June 25th**. Corky will be talking about the big endorsements he's received, September's primary election, and his plans to take on career politician Jeanne Shaheen. **Don’t forget that this in an interactive event, so please bring your questions for Corky!** We’ll see you there! -Team Messner | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2c076b6325fb92fd/34d3e605c9b3a4d3c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2c076b6325fb92fd/9f3e36a9e48860d8c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

| Peter, I've got news for Kendra Horn: **we're sending her home in November.** She's portrayed herself as a "moderate" Democrat, but make no mistake: Kendra Horn has been nothing short of a rubber stamp vote for Nancy Pelosi and her extremist liberal agenda in Congress; an agenda that consists of **radical social policies, open borders, ObamaCare, reckless spending and higher taxes.** My team has [launched our newest ad](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=58fac22db3&e=795c6d9796) to highlight how Kendra Horn and the radical Democrats are destroying our nation’s sovereignty. We need to make sure we FLOOD the airwaves with our new ad, which is why **I’m asking you to help raise $5,000 dollars by midnight tonight.** These ads are how we get our conservative message out to the voters. [**Please contribute anything you can by midnight tonight to our BLANKET THE AIRWAVES fund >>**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=fbecd30f0b&e=795c6d9796)

| Here in Oklahoma, we pride ourselves on being among the most conservative states in the country. It's why**we elected Donald Trump by a 36-point margin** in 2016. And it's why **Kendra Horn has been rated the #1 most vulnerable incumbent** in the House of Representatives. Liberal money has poured in from every corner of the country to try and keep her in this seat. She's got the backing of the entire national Democratic Party as well as Planned Parenthood, and they're going to spend millions to try and influence your vote. [**If we're going to fight back against this big money, we're going to need your support. subject: True colors
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sánchez |
body:
When nearly 40 million people lost their jobs because of COVID-19, Linda was championing the country's largest stimulus package in history to help working Americans.

When small businesses were shuttering their doors nationwide, Linda was helping pass the CARES Act to keep them afloat.

When frontline workers were putting their lives on the line to keep us safe, Linda was strengthening the Heroes Act to provide essential workers with proper compensation.

Linda has been on the side of working people throughout the COVID-19 health crisis and she will continue to be an advocate for everyday Americans long after it's over.

Help keep Linda in Congress | Make a Donation>>

Thank you,

-- Team Sánchez

Peter,

This week, Woody and I released **a six-point plan for reforming Indiana's criminal justice system.** Gov. Holcomb continues to talk with no action, not shocking, coming from past legislative priorities that show ZERO effort to reform systemic bias.

Hoosiers deserve an administration willing to put in the work and do what’s hard. Woody and I have what it takes to lead that administration -- but we can’t get there without you. **[Can you chip in now to help deliver the reform Hoosier communities deserve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17986272/213276486/618720191?refcode=20200623_f_1_fl&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc4ZTBhOS1hZGI1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_dBqzuBkVRBdNaNt2dVw5gMwnT9xwWQdLmnjc7LQJA=)**

As the first woman to serve on the Hammond, Indiana police force, I know how important it is to improve the relationship between law enforcement and Hoosier communities.

Hoosiers know the time to change how police serve citizens is now. **Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help us make this change happen?**

Thank you for standing with us,

\-- Linda Lawson

Linda Lawson is a lifelong champion for social justice and equality, women, workers, animals, and public schools. Linda was the first female officer of the Hammond Police Department and retired as Captain 24 years later. In 1998, She was elected to the Indiana House of Representatives representing District 1. She served as the House Judiciary Chair for six years and in 2012, became the first female elected by the House Democratic caucus to serve as the Floor Leader and remained there until her retirement in 2018. Since retirement, Linda has been living in Nashville, Indiana with her two best fur friends, Sophie and Hank, and is an active member of the community currently, serving on the Town of Nashville’s Election Board and Nashville Police Department Merit Board.

**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17986278/213276492/618720191?refcode=20200623_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDc4ZTBhOS1hZGI1LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9_dBqzuBkVRBdNaNt2dVw5gMwnT9xwWQdLmnjc7LQJA=)**

Dr. Woody Myers is running to be Governor of Indiana because he knows our state needs new leadership where people are first - not politics. As Governor, Woody will use his background in business and in medicine to guarantee all Hoosiers can access high-quality health care at an affordable cost, bring more good-paying jobs that can’t be shipped overseas to Indiana and provide every Hoosier child with a world-class public education.

Woody is running a grassroots campaign, which means our success is fueled by supporters like you. subject: VOTE TODAY – THERE'S STILL TIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JACOBS FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, Did you see Chris' email this morning? Today is election day, and there is still time for you, your friends, and your family members to vote! [Find your polling place here - polls are open to 9:00 PM EST](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/I92AQdqEbLUQx3892JutCg763w/0O4L763892WcGHHYG2lwfPLj2Q) Both the Special and Primary elections today are critical to ensuring that we send strong conservative leadership to Congress to help President Trump. Chris is honored to be the only candidate in this race to have our great President's complete and total endorsement. Together let's reject the nasty, negative politics of Beth Parlato and Nate McMurray and send President Trump a strong ally who will support him! We need your vote in both the primary and special election today - you must GET OUT AND VOTE today! Sincerely,
Team Jacobs
> Friend, Today is the day! We need every single Republican voter in NY27 to get out and vote TODAY in both the Special and Primary Elections! These elections are critical and every single vote counts - that's why you need to go vote today and remind all your friends and family members to vote as well! I am proud to have the complete and total endorsement of our President in both elections and it is incredibly important that we send him a strong conservative leader to help accomplish his America First Agenda. [Find your polling place here - polls are open until 9:00 PM EST](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/OAst8O6Rl3q4KZFnr763R83g/I92AQdqEbLUQx3892JutCg763w/0O4L763892WcGHHYG2lwfPLj2Q) With me in office, I promise to respect your values, support our region, and fight for our future. I strongly urge you to get out and vote today, and I humbly ask for your vote in both the primary and special election happening today. Best,
> Chris Jacobs
>

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Be part of history!
body:
We’re one week away from the end of the 2nd Quarter and have another $26,000 to raise to hit our fundraising goal. If you haven’t already, please donate today.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057402-48227a760e-5f480e3b4a)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057401-748b0fcfbf-5f480e3b4a) We’re one week away from the end of the 2nd Quarter and have another $26,000 to raise to hit our fundraising goal. [**If you haven’t already, please donate today**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057401-748b0fcfbf-5f480e3b4a).

If you can make another contribution, [please don’t hold back!](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057401-748b0fcfbf-5f480e3b4a)

Thanks to the great response to our first campaign ad, “Democrat Chaos” we’re launching the ad today . . . and producing the next ad to come out later this week.

You know I’m running to flip President Trump’s home district red.

What you may not know is that WHEN I win, **I’ll be the YOUNGEST woman EVER elected to the U.S. Congress**.

The record is currently held by AOC, and I’m happy to “dethrone” her.

[By supporting my campaign, **you’ll be part of that history**.](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057401-748b0fcfbf-5f480e3b4a)

More importantly, you’ll be supporting my first term in Congress, and I won’t be letting you down.

**We need new blood in Congress that is unafraid to take on the Democrat Establishment.**

It’s too easy to “sit down and shut up” when radical Democrats take aim at you with their slurs and labels . . . and they’ve already called me just about every name in the book.

Their tactics make no impact on me and I don’t give them any thought.

Throughout my career as an investigative journalist, I've never lost sleep worrying about what would happen to me if I exposed the truth about a politician or public figure.

**As a member of Congress, I’m dedicated to doing what’s right for this country and together,[we can win Florida’s 21st Congressional seat](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057401-748b0fcfbf-5f480e3b4a).**

We can secure this seat for President and Mrs. Trump so that they can finally be represented by a member of Congress who puts the interests of America before petty politics.

[**Help me get to Washington by donating today before the FEC deadline.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057401-748b0fcfbf-5f480e3b4a)

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

P.S. We still need funding for our campaign ads. Remember, [for every $25 you donate, we can reach 1,000 voters in the 21st District](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057401-748b0fcfbf-5f480e3b4a). Thanks again.

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-5057401-748b0fcfbf-5f480e3b4a)

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.
---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/unsubscribe/2-561017072-4395-381141-897985-84585d41bbe610b-5f480e3b4a)
