name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC Congratulates Rep. Thomas Massie ﻿on Victory in KY-04
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: June 23, 2020
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Congratulates Representative Thomas Massie on Victory in KY-04
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, congratulates their endorsed candidate, Representative Thomas Massie, on his victory tonight to become the Republican nominee for Kentucky's 4th Congressional District.
Protect Freedom PAC was proud to endorse Representative Massie in January and to support his candidacy with multiple significant expenditures.
---
|
---
| Protect Freedom PAC has more than $1.6 million cash on hand and is planning independent expenditure campaigns totaling $5 million for the 2020 election cycle, including in support of endorsed candidates in Republican primaries.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Congratulations to Representative Thomas Massie on his definitive primary victory in Kentucky's 4th district. Thomas Massie is one of the strongest voices for liberty in Congress and has never wavered in his fight for limited government, less spending, and lower taxes. We were proud to support him in this race, and we look forward to seeing him continue his good work in Washington on Kentucky's behalf."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606

Protect Freedom PAC was proud to endorse Representative Massie in January and to support his candidacy with multiple significant expenditures. | | Protect Freedom PAC has more than $1.6 million cash on hand and is planning independent expenditure campaigns totaling $5 million for the 2020 election cycle, including in support of endorsed candidates in Republican primaries. Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated: "Congratulations to Representative Thomas Massie on his definitive primary victory in Kentucky's 4th district. Thomas Massie is one of the strongest voices for liberty in Congress and has never wavered in his fight for limited government, less spending, and lower taxes. We were proud to support him in this race, and we look forward to seeing him continue his good work in Washington on Kentucky's behalf." Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President. | | | | Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul. | | | ### | | | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606 | | Sent by mailto:info@protectfreedompac.com in collaboration with |

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Nikki Haley has joined Team Scheller
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I hope you saw Nikki Haley’s email to you, if not, I wanted to bump it back up for you. Over the weekend, Nikki Haley, former Secretary to the Unit Peter, I hope you saw Nikki Haley’s email to you, if not, I wanted to bump it back up for you.
Over the weekend, Nikki Haley, former Secretary to the United Nations, as well as the 118th Governor of South Carolina, endorsed our campaign.
This is not just another name on a list, Peter. I have long admired the work Ambassador Haley has accomplished, while not just working across the aisle, but across borders.
Nikki has not only been a champion for conservative values on a national and international scale – but a much-needed voice for Republican women, like me, who are working to bring our experience as leaders in government and business into the Halls of Congress.
Nikki has asked that you join her in endorsing my campaign for Congress by pitching in for a brighter future in the Lehigh Valley and our country: [**JOIN TEAM SCHELLER**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5b303cc93e594d2c9511a68b7065350a&_e=L0vYvW2AKj_kCDY_R_s7Zw8ojViTOQZ6cXIiv7vVgNYyUXu6QKaSeo6SimZlLtAUKnCD5PFPNbUKaLEbMZJvpVTDXtPmZNiUQkg5hjw0YDX4a8L0jShwwRl5s6Z5f14CMVFwvMj02RywRU9RlfNd21YUpy1wBobJi5YfheILLNnwbDgM6_bUi_R8nAAUWoMF3uYDrIo3Yerc_YnaP0TddGZCXkK8ZMhPVYaixZkNbBNIPy25vdXN6dUscWgCqlsP80CTielc3oGXtlATVU7vtJCx5A3Ck9kQjfc11x22r6Vjq7tehFVmuJWqjYSxz44CU5YOfeJyJsox9YwDLXWxEEKa1Zis3Oa9-eaRnp2rHvXpJ1XXBVW4fAfVMDYKm2r_CXhOZ28pzp8T7YxWFCn1D8KynY1DTH3DrQUXke2252ygB43u38rBhoAT60lcdhwnmDsh49RVVdhDmTMIeUNYGw%3D%3D) I am humbled by Nikki’s endorsement, and her addition to our campaign team goes to show that we are just getting started.
Peter, if you’ve seen my endorsements, you know this is another big notch in our belt of our country’s top female leaders in government that have supported my campaign (like Congresswoman Elise Stefanik).
But, the traction isn’t stopping. Now, more than ever, we need to continue to push forward as we begin our full out sprint in our campaign to reclaim PA-07 and take our Lehigh Valley perspective to Washington.
**[Will you join us, Peter?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5b303cc93e594d2c9511a68b7065350a&_e=L0vYvW2AKj_kCDY_R_s7Zw8ojViTOQZ6cXIiv7vVgNYyUXu6QKaSeo6SimZlLtAUKnCD5PFPNbUKaLEbMZJvpVTDXtPmZNiUQkg5hjw0YDX4a8L0jShwwRl5s6Z5f14CMVFwvMj02RywRU9RlfNd21YUpy1wBobJi5YfheILLNnwbDgM6_bUi_R8nAAUWoMF3uYDrIo3Yerc_YnaP0TddGZCXkK8ZMhPVYaixZkNbBOIt9xnpQt8pSstAuKh0y1ul_0IRL9_FbEOTag2APwS2OWfln_8e7y-6P68OUxldZVmV1leFZ-bJHUNSiiENTM8HBB0tos_H2XUdx4bmTr3QhX1HDuqDvPx5MpLQcHAk8Fy8Muz083eRF-Q1wAn_Eimd25ekyZKDaskrsl6aUEL71fw4ERU-oOuKOtgTmByVSQodWATO-MiFN4ZIfeDJw9dIkQrmQmUCFJh-7vfqtA1mg%3D%3D)** [**JOIN TEAM SCHELLER**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5b303cc93e594d2c9511a68b7065350a&_e=L0vYvW2AKj_kCDY_R_s7Zw8ojViTOQZ6cXIiv7vVgNYyUXu6QKaSeo6SimZlLtAUKnCD5PFPNbUKaLEbMZJvpVTDXtPmZNiUQkg5hjw0YDX4a8L0jShwwRl5s6Z5f14CMVFwvMj02RywRU9RlfNd21YUpy1wBobJi5YfheILLNnwbDgM6_bUi_R8nAAUWoMF3uYDrIo3Yerc_YnaP0TddGZCXkK8ZMhPVYaixZkNbBMhSTuqjECbSXBJFKgkXcoNLiEoo-bNlUd50nGi926jHc2ElOCBcCxcniQodulW3ltASPJYrxkItwi2k6TJXEtHof2W-t1YVLLLhBENus6YxwPDRRFP2M-U5fGI783XZuRK9RmuGJOePRTY76oTECDHr949qVnf4WDf8XnaHWOOcOTF8SMIA9II_Hs1r7dGIHXb17M3I6uvUPOXgQPwBjh_8lGvgWgLaIcx8ifpf-O4Fg%3D%3D) Our momentum can’t slow down now, Peter. This is the exact moment where our foot must remain on the gas, not slowing down for anything.
Will you join us in this fight? Will you stand alongside my campaign as we work to spread our conservative message across the district?
**[Will you do all YOU can do to ensure that come November, a conservative will be filling PA-07’s congressional seat, and not a Far-Left Democrat?](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=5b303cc93e594d2c9511a68b7065350a&_e=L0vYvW2AKj_kCDY_R_s7Zw8ojViTOQZ6cXIiv7vVgNYyUXu6QKaSeo6SimZlLtAUKnCD5PFPNbUKaLEbMZJvpVTDXtPmZNiUQkg5hjw0YDX4a8L0jShwwRl5s6Z5f14CMVFwvMj02RywRU9RlfNd27H1_ugNmPNk-k9EFTpNTsEV7iP_SDQY5Z2CKNgLRn-JEkELl0RA0Z-qhtlojJErJSjPf3RWHef6rPleHF9uU2ld4oePRR9wUUTg1baSthlBo86mGIPdsqcd5Gb7LrKGjorkwE32L2Za_860yHw1rdQCGvRpnGPHiSPqzz1d4sV6JWeQoRaQJkFegqz3UZWsH2vH6_2af3L-caJcdC2K5kjEkm2Y_6iWK7KHzoe2lsq2S_C6XiBEAKKY77ciByUex4jR5GJ3m0VXZuFmpvbyjzE0d-2e-TEAJ_7QkXBbfo1t)**

body:

name: Marcy, Digital Director
subject: what's in "store" for our campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

We're thrilled that Virginia Democrats have already declared Mark Warner as the official Senate nominee for 2020. I wanted to remind you that there are a number of congressional primaries around Virginia today -- please make sure your vote is heard! You can visit [**iwillvote.com**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d400/53d9897e/54aec081/1c884309/3383746383/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://iwillvote.com") to make sure you're registered to vote and find your polling location if you haven't already voted by mail.

After you cast your ballot, I'd love your feedback on something we've been working on here at the Warner campaign.

You might have noticed that our emails lately have been sporting a fresh logo. We recently finished up a brand refresh project and launched a [**brand-new website**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d400/53d9897e/54aec081/1c884308/3383746383/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "http://markwarnerva.com")! The new site includes:
* In-depth information on Mark Warner's work for the people of Virginia, including an outline of his work to [**combat the coronavirus pandemic**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d400/53d9897e/54aec081/1c884377/3383746383/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/on-the-issues/fighting-coronavirus/");

* Details on how you can [**get involved**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d400/53d9897e/54aec081/1c884376/3383746383/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/get-involved/") with Mark's re-election campaign, including a [**digital organizing page**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d400/53d9897e/54aec081/1c884375/3383746383/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/digital-organizing/");

* And all of the [**latest news**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d400/53d9897e/54aec081/1c884374/3383746383/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/category/latest-news/") about what Mark's doing in the Senate and in the Commonwealth to fight for _every_ Virginian.

I'd love it if you checked out the site and let our team know what you think. On top of the site itself, we're excited to be launching our [**official campaign store**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d400/53d9897e/54aec081/1c884373/3383746383/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://store.markwarnerva.com/"). There's even a little something in there for folks who were a fan of Mark's tuna melt video. This fall, you can wear your support for Mark Warner on your sleeve (or your head, or your car, or your laptop...).

[**Check out our campaign store here!**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d400/53d9897e/54aec081/1c884373/3383746383/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://store.markwarnerva.com/")

Thanks for your support! Be well.

-- Marcy, Digital Director

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Thank you
body:
Peter,

The polls are officially closed here in Brooklyn, and all I can say is, thank you.

When we first entered this race eleven months ago, I never could have imagined how far this movement would take us. What began as an upstart, grassroots campaign turned into something bigger than I could have ever imagined, and it was all because of your energy, excitement, and commitment to bringing true people-powered change to Washington. None of this would have been possible without supporters like you, and I’m so grateful that you were a part of our team.

With so many voters casting their ballots by mail, it’s hard to predict when we’ll know the final outcome of this race, but whatever happens, I couldn’t be prouder of the work we’ve put in, and I couldn’t be prouder to be your candidate.

We’ll keep you posted with any election updates, but until then, I hope you’ll keep joining us in our fight for bold ways, not old ways.

Thank you,
Adem Bunkeddeko

name: Matt Mayberry
subject: Fox News: rigged NH election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Mayberry for Congress P
body:
| Derek-- It's been widely reported by Fox News that **DC groups are trying to rig our primary election here in the Granite State.**

As I told Fox News, I'm running the same election strategy Donald Trump did in the 2016 presidential primary. Trump disregarded the Washington establishment who wanted Jeb Bush, and he spoke directly to the citizens of New Hampshire.

Long story short, **they're trying to rig our elections** \-- and frankly, that's offensive to me and it should be to you.

Last week, we launched our Voter Integrity Fund to fight back, and we were BLOWN AWAY at the results.

**Even better, we received a TRIPLE MATCH offer from a major donor who has agreed to help us fight back, but only for contributions made through midnight tomorrow!**

**[TRIPLE MATCH: Voter Integrity Fund (secure link)](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDUwMjI4OTkxNjAzNTEyNTQ2JmM9eTJhMCZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNjE5MDI3MzAmZD1oM2k3eTl4.pOvHOvpBGwxkorBa8zFyNOQv2fXrHg-kV98mkKgsZjo "TRIPLE MATCH: Voter Integrity Fund \(secure link\)")**

We don't have a lot of time to fight back against these MASSIVE groups, but we DO have the grassroots support from Granite Staters like you.

Our New Hampshire values are at stake. Please do what you can today!

-Matt Mayberry | |

name: Dr. Ayana Elizabeth Johnson
subject: Black Americans care deeply about the climate crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
I'm a Black scientist, and this is personal to me.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=872%2E53494%2EmobNKQ) Friend, I'll remember this spring as the season when my heart broke over and over again. The murders of Breonna Taylor, George Floyd, Tony McDade, David McAtee, Rayshard Brooks -- five new names in a long line of Black people needlessly killed by police -- knocked the wind out of me. Meanwhile, the coronavirus pandemic continues to rage, taking the air from the lungs of Black Americans whose upbringings in the shadows of polluting factories and toxic waste sites have left them more vulnerable to disease. As a Black scientist, the intersection of race and the climate crisis is personal to me. People want to see these as separate issues -- believe me, I get it, addressing climate is hard enough on its own -- but they are inseparable. I joined Evergreen Action's Advisory Board in part because they get this. In hopes of reaching more people about these intersections, I wrote about how racism derails our efforts to defeat the climate crisis for _The Washington Post._ | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/394?t=3&akid=872%2E53494%2EmobNKQ)
---
[**Read and share my op-ed to spread the word about the critical link between combating racism and ending the climate crisis.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/394?t=4&akid=872%2E53494%2EmobNKQ)
Now that police brutality and racial injustice are at the top of the headlines, we must turn collective anguish into collective action. I've been pleased to see these efforts start to bring about real changes in many cities.
Climate activists should take heed: Addressing racial injustice in America is a central and inextricable component of addressing the climate crisis. Not only because people of color are more impacted by climate disasters but also because, per polling, we are more concerned about climate change and can more effectively lead our communities toward climate solutions if unburdened by the many manifestations of racism.
[**Becoming anti-racist will accelerate climate solutions -- and that's what my op-ed invites you to do. I hope you'll read and share it to spread the word about how the fights for racial justice and climate justice are intertwined.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/394?t=5&akid=872%2E53494%2EmobNKQ)
Solving the climate crisis is going to take all of us. Polling shows that there are tens of millions of Black Americans who care deeply about the climate crisis but are forced to focus on other risks instead of fully dedicating themselves to the climate fight.
By becoming anti-racist and inviting people in our lives to join us, we can create the space for Black people to give the climate crisis all we've got.
Thank you,
Dr. Ayana Elizabeth Johnson
Evergreen Advisory Board Member
[READ AND SHARE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/394?t=6&akid=872%2E53494%2EmobNKQ)
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=872%2E53494%2EmobNKQ). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

People want to see these as separate issues -- believe me, I get it, addressing climate is hard enough on its own -- but they are inseparable. I joined Evergreen Action's Advisory Board in part because they get this. In hopes of reaching more people about these intersections, I wrote about how racism derails our efforts to defeat the climate crisis for The Washington Post. | Now that police brutality and racial injustice are at the top of the headlines, we must turn collective anguish into collective action. I've been pleased to see these efforts start to bring about real changes in many cities. Climate activists should take heed: Addressing racial injustice in America is a central and inextricable component of addressing the climate crisis. Not only because people of color are more impacted by climate disasters but also because, per polling, we are more concerned about climate change and can more effectively lead our communities toward climate solutions if unburdened by the many manifestations of racism. Solving the climate crisis is going to take all of us. Polling shows that there are tens of millions of Black Americans who care deeply about the climate crisis but are forced to focus on other risks instead of fully dedicating themselves to the climate fight. By becoming anti-racist and inviting people in our lives to join us, we can create the space for Black people to give the climate crisis all we've got. Thank you, Dr. Ayana Elizabeth Johnson Evergreen Advisory Board Member

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Helping our neighbors who don't have access to other programs
body:
Your COVID-19 news update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
As I've said so many times, the people hardest hit by this pandemic have unfortunately been the ones who can least afford it. That's especially true for our immigrant community, many of whom are prohibited from accessing the federal benefits that have helped so many others make ends meet during this crisis. It's not right. So we're doing something about it.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C3woNTjWtRhi2woU2P_1mVji4ZU5215sBaq0NAXpvGRyZSsDlzb_oPdQ2xd5m1NTQVqpjCBYa78ezhTGfjMwwI57sVVA3BNnUpk0CoBIChRDcE3EiZYZoh8nkPw5rOU2FJIxg03MU4bsfluzUUL3PU_4d58EWdr5uO43S-01nKaRz23zUNpwLaw8vXuyyw90&c=8FHN53Gii-bToV5VZNg_eTNrJ2-MMYs502zLNeLCKVmO-skCk2Mqbg==&ch=jxOU2LK_zE7ekBofS7GzNRxE0CTVOYBCIbs0xq3bGcVdV-5ufmdmzA==)
---
| That's why we launched the WeR1 Rhode Island Fund. This fund will provide direct cash assistance to Rhode Islanders who are unable to benefit from most public programs due to their immigration status. Frankly, many of these are the folks who've been working on the frontlines throughout this crisis and are now sick or lost their job. They deserve our support.
We have a goal to raise $3 million to provide thousands of families in need with $400 debit cards, and we're calling on all Rhode Islanders with means to help get us there. We're also making it easy. Through our partnerships with Dorcas International and Goodworld, you can text WeR1 to 27126 to donate. It's that simple. Dorcas will be facilitating this program and working with community partners to ensure this assistance gets into the hands of the families that need it most.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C3woNTjWtRhi2woU2P_1mVji4ZU5215sBaq0NAXpvGRyZSsDlzb_oPE0SXYG7ABmio3UbE9DLs2y90aejZt0DkufGbWgXmugGzie0ubSBLQ3cs5Ibggp3R1RrodyVDwe0nZzM3dYMOLwNwCvC3a1ypeCPYb4ldlsBiq0RfhAIMO68iKwF4_SIb8-KlACaFFytXOo8iAHYFA=&c=8FHN53Gii-bToV5VZNg_eTNrJ2-MMYs502zLNeLCKVmO-skCk2Mqbg==&ch=jxOU2LK_zE7ekBofS7GzNRxE0CTVOYBCIbs0xq3bGcVdV-5ufmdmzA==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C3woNTjWtRhi2woU2P_1mVji4ZU5215sBaq0NAXpvGRyZSsDlzb_oPE0SXYG7ABmio3UbE9DLs2y90aejZt0DkufGbWgXmugGzie0ubSBLQ3cs5Ibggp3R1RrodyVDwe0nZzM3dYMOLwNwCvC3a1ypeCPYb4ldlsBiq0RfhAIMO68iKwF4_SIb8-KlACaFFytXOo8iAHYFA=&c=8FHN53Gii-bToV5VZNg_eTNrJ2-MMYs502zLNeLCKVmO-skCk2Mqbg==&ch=jxOU2LK_zE7ekBofS7GzNRxE0CTVOYBCIbs0xq3bGcVdV-5ufmdmzA==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| I'm happy to report that in just the past few days, we've raised more than $41,000. I hope that you can join in too to help your fellow Rhode Islanders. Donations of any size are encouraged. Now is the time for neighbors to help neighbors. We need to rise together. If you can help, I encourage you to do so.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C3woNTjWtRhi2woU2P_1mVji4ZU5215sBaq0NAXpvGRyZSsDlzb_oPdQ2xd5m1NT6jxpdiHZjngOO5rVgvHKEqShHcX7By8oVmyb8G-XJDKPsRul_ScojJOao_pIgEcFVhRNQsEv3k_-mOhI8k3Zv2DDmWPs5oVZlZV9ZzICVxe107Kl6EIABlf9lyIDdvvodjwjNU_caVnCTzABmbMsZkzeZyAmkvETF3WIykAGFL4-PnwsdNZkHuLHVF0FdtdjXcJXPMUnYk2chwghw3FXpey1pnr2PKx144_XbI1-evGF4b8xCWuseTh6yS8XeX7Cj-dd4Gqyvy8=&c=8FHN53Gii-bToV5VZNg_eTNrJ2-MMYs502zLNeLCKVmO-skCk2Mqbg==&ch=jxOU2LK_zE7ekBofS7GzNRxE0CTVOYBCIbs0xq3bGcVdV-5ufmdmzA==).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Lauren=20Underwood?=
subject: This race is critical
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/26329f49469e/this-race-is-critical?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Dani Brzozowski is working hard to defeat the last remaining Republican member of Congress in northern Illinois, and I'm doing everything I can to make sure she wins. **This race matters to me because Dani's district, IL-16, borders the district that I represent and I need a neighbor who will be a partner in Congress.** Dani's opponent has stood in the way of progress and has flat out refused to work with me on the issues that are most critical to our constituents. **The people of IL-16 deserve better, and that's why I'm supporting Dani. ** I know that Dani will help lead the fight to lower prescription drug costs, expand voting rights, and protect our environment. Dani and I share values, and I need your help to make sure she's serving right alongside me in Congress. [ Can you join me in supporting Dani by making a donation today?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=ee64cbbab2&e=140a9b81e7)

**Dani's campaign has a lot of momentum right now** , as Democrats recognize an opportunity to win this district. But the Republicans and their donors see it, too. They've already started pouring in outside money to drown out Dani's message to the voters. We can't let them win.

**Dani has an important fundraising deadline in 7 days, and she needs your support to hit her fundraising goal.** Your donation to Dani's campaign will make sure that she can fight back against the dishonest Republican attacks that will try to tear her down during this last stretch of the campaign. **I can't wait to work with Dani in Congress, but I need you to help make sure that happens. ** Lauren Underwood US Congresswoman, IL-14
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump celebrates 200 miles of new border wall
body:
At 6:40 p.m. ET this evening, President Trump will deliver an address to young Americans at the Dream City Church in Phoenix, Arizona. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=db1f230d8a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 23, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE: President Trump speaks in Phoenix**

**At 6:40 p.m. ET** this evening, President Trump will deliver an address to young Americans at the Dream City Church in Phoenix, Arizona.

🎬 [**WATCH LIVE: President Trump addresses young Americans**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=79087c03d0&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **200 miles of new border wall**

**President Trump** is in Arizona today, where he just visited the border to celebrate more than 200 miles of new border wall completed.

**“We’re on pace** to complete 450 miles by the end of the year, and 500 miles almost immediately thereafter,” the President said at a roundtable in Yuma.

🎬 [**President Trump: Our border has never been more secure!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=70beadf860&e=3ee4985eea)

**“Illegal immigration** is down 84 percent from this time last year. Illegal crossings from Central America are down 97 percent,” he added. Nearly 450,000 pounds of drugs have been seized this year alone.

**As of today** , U.S. Customs and Border Protection has built approximately 216 miles of new wall system. Six miles have gone up in just the past week. Construction is underway now for 339 additional miles in high-priority locations along the southern border.

**“My administration** has done more than any administration in history to secure our southern border,” President Trump said today.

**Border security** is national security, the President says. Criminal organizations, including drug traffickers and human smugglers, have long exploited America’s porous southern border to put the lives of both U.S. citizens and law-abiding immigrants at risk.

**Tragically, children** are often the biggest victims. Vicious, transnational gangs such as MS-13 pray on minors and commit heinous attacks in communities across America.

**Under President Trump,** the rule of law is being restored, legal immigration is being protected, and American neighborhoods are being kept safe from drugs and violence.

🎬 [**Stop crime at the border, not in our communities!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06b4dbd1a4&e=3ee4985eea)

**In case you missed it** : [**President Trump takes action to protect U.S. workers**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acc6b4725a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump visits the completed 200th mile of new border wall** | June 23, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17526bfe55&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41423bbc6c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=7941aad82c)
---

---
